purpose: Out-of-sample competition-style forecasting catalog for testing CartoBoost beyond maintained M4/M5/M6 artifacts.
claim_boundary: These datasets are recommended next validation targets. They are not CartoBoost quality evidence until adapters, split definitions, commands, and artifacts are committed.

datasets.name: Tourism forecasting competition datasets
datasets.source: Monash Time Series Forecasting Repository / Zenodo tourism datasets
datasets.why_it_matters: Tests M4-like frequency variation on a competition dataset that is not one of the maintained M4/M5/M6 artifacts.
datasets.ship_gate: Auto must beat or tie lag on every frequency group and beat at least one serious statistical baseline on aggregate.

datasets.name: NN5 cash-withdrawal forecasting competition
datasets.task_shape: short panel with weekly seasonality and demand spikes
datasets.why_it_matters: Tests sparse-ish operational demand outside taxi, retail, and finance.
datasets.ship_gate: Auto must beat lag and seasonal naive on rolling-origin quality without materially worse runtime.

datasets.name: Store Sales - Time Series Forecasting
datasets.task_shape: multi-store, multi-family retail panel with promotions and calendar events
datasets.why_it_matters: Tests whether CartoBoost can use tabular covariates and calendar structure on a modern public retail competition distinct from M5.
datasets.ship_gate: Use train-only validation splits; auto must beat lag, seasonal naive, and a LightGBM lag baseline on RMSLE.

datasets.name: Web Traffic Time Series Forecasting
datasets.task_shape: large high-cardinality panel with missing values, spikes, language/project metadata, and intermittent traffic
datasets.why_it_matters: Tests scale, high-cardinality series IDs, intermittent behavior, and robustness to missing values.
datasets.ship_gate: Run a fixed sample and a scalable large-panel slice; auto must beat lag and median/seasonal baselines while preserving bounded memory.

datasets.name: Global Energy Forecasting Competition 2012 load forecasting
datasets.task_shape: hierarchical zonal load panel with calendar and weather-sensitive seasonality
datasets.why_it_matters: Tests hourly multi-seasonality, hierarchy, and energy-demand behavior outside transportation and retail.
datasets.ship_gate: Auto must beat lag and seasonal naive on zonal and total-load levels, with explicit hierarchy/coherence reporting.

datasets.name: KDD Cup 2018 air quality forecasting
datasets.task_shape: sensor panel with missingness, exogenous context, and local temporal structure
datasets.why_it_matters: Tests missing-data handling and environmental sensor behavior that is not sales, finance, or taxi demand.
datasets.ship_gate: Auto must beat lag and classical baselines under train-only imputation and fixed rolling-origin splits.
